name: ticket-plugin
description: Per-ticket tracking for Linear / JIRA tickets, with end-to-end PR and ship-it commands. Six slash commands — /ticket-plugin:start, :pause, :update, :archive, :pr, and :merge — keep a durable per-ticket plan + findings + progress log outside the repo, sync the plan back to the ticket on close, open a PR with a pre-commit simplify pass and CodeRabbit review polling, and wrap merge-PR + transition-to-Done + archive into one confirmed step.
